summary: Manual Bank Transfer Feature - All 52 tests passed (26 backend + 26 frontend)

issues.description: BankRedeemPage.js has no data-testid attributes for automated testing. Add data-testid to interactive elements like amount input, IFSC input, verify button, submit button, tab buttons, etc.
AdminBankTransfers.js has no data-testid attributes for automated testing. Add data-testid to table rows, action buttons (Mark Paid/Failed), filters, search input, and pagination controls.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to BankRedeemPage.js for better E2E testing
Add data-testid attributes to AdminBankTransfers.js for better E2E testing
seed_data_creation: None - tests use API endpoints without database seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Manual Bank Transfer Feature Testing Complete - Iteration 121

## Backend Tests (26 passed):
- Bank Transfer Config API: GET /api/bank-transfer/config - Returns PRC rate (10), fees (₹10 + 20%), limits (₹200-₹10,000)
- Fee Calculation API: GET /api/bank-transfer/calculate-fees - Correctly calculates all fees and PRC requirements
- IFSC Verification API: POST /api/bank-transfer/verify-ifsc - Validates IFSC format, returns bank names (HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis)
- Admin Requests API: GET /api/bank-transfer/admin/requests - Returns paginated list with stats, supports filters
- Admin Stats API: GET /api/bank-transfer/admin/stats - Returns pending/paid/failed counts and amounts
- User Requests API: GET /api/bank-transfer/my-requests/{user_id} - Returns user's request history

## Frontend Tests (26 passed):
- Same API validations through Playwright request API
- UI redirection tests: Both BankRedeemPage and AdminBankTransfers correctly redirect to login when unauthenticated

## Notes:
1. Full UI testing requires authentication - login test credentials needed
2. No data-testid attributes in frontend pages - reported as improvement items
3. All APIs working correctly with proper validation
4. Preview database has no test bank transfer requests yet

## API Summary:
- Config: 1 INR = 10 PRC, ₹10 transaction fee, 20% admin fee
- Limits: Min ₹200, Max ₹10,000
- IFSC: Supports major banks via Eko API with fallback to IFSC prefix lookup

features_tested.Admin Requests List API: PASSED - GET /api/bank-transfer/admin/requests with pagination, filters, search
